{{Infobox character
| name = Therian Nills
| aliases = Therian
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Underlord transformation]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|chosen of the Stormcallers}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Underlord]], chosen of Reigan Shen}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Stormcallers]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|farmer}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Therian Nills, also known as Therian, is a member of the [[Stormcallers]]. Formerly an ordinary man who had lost everything, he was taken in and trained by the [[Stormcallers]], a group that follows the [[Dreadgod]] to capture its unique [[madra]] and utilize divine techniques to take [[madra]] from others. As a chosen of [[Reigan Shen]], Therian participated in a tournament where he faced Ziel of the [[Dawnwing Sect]], who was chosen by [[Northstrider]]. During this match, Therian utilized a pair of long spears emitting yellow light and displayed lightning-like rings around his arms. Despite appearing to struggle against Ziel's hammer, the combat ended when Ziel crushed Therian's head, causing his body and blood to dissolve into white light.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Therian Nills]] is a chosen of the [[Stormcallers]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Originally an ordinary man born to a family of farmers, Therian Nills eventually underwent an [[Underlord transformation]]. As a chosen of [[Reigan Shen]], he wields a pair of long spears that are characterized by a smooth yellow light. Though his path diverged from others, he would have joined [[Calan Archer]] if the opportunity had been permitted.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Therian Nills]] is an ordinary man who was a farmer and the son of farmers.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Therian Nills]] has undergone an [[Underlord transformation]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Therian Nills]] is a chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Therian Nills]]'s weapons are a pair of long spears that crawl with smooth yellow light.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Therian would have joined [[Calan Archer]] if allowed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Stormcallers]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
